name_en: Celine Counter upgraded TRIOMPHE canvas and smooth calfskin strap wallet
name_cn:
Celine Counter upgraded TRIOMPHE canvas and smooth calfskin strap wallet
8 x 5 inches (20 x 11.5 cm)
62% coated canvas, 38% calfskin
57% cowhide, 43% fabric lining
Crossbody and shoulder carry
Button closure
2 corner gusset pockets
1 zip pocket
1 flat pocket
8 card slots
Adjustable calfskin shoulder strap 19 inches (48 cm)
43 to 53 cm
Style No.: 10D852
